steps.description: Type  ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}}  into the "Input an application name" text field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension popup within Visual Studio Code.
Press Enter to confirm the application name ${{var:app_name:vscuse_app_#####}} in the input dialog at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Perform a right-click on the "Preview README.md" tab header in the Visual Studio Code interface to access contextual options for the file preview.
Click on the "Close" option in the context menu of a tab within Visual Studio Code to close the currently active file or tab.
